response.justification: Bogdan has a strong background in software development with diverse experience across various technologies and domains. While he has some exposure to AI through his work on AI-agent infrastructure, his experience is not directly aligned with the AI strategy focus of the role. His entrepreneurial experience with GISCollective is a positive factor.
concerns: Limited direct experience in AI strategy
No clear evidence of cloud expertise
Not directly matching the 15-year seniority requirement in a single domain
